title: Incorrectly Flipping Bits of a Number to Zero Count

statement.markdown: Solve the problem and fix the bugs.
statement.inputFormat: Given a non-negative integer, count the number of set bits (bits with value 1) in its binary representation.
statement.outputFormat: Return a map where keys are bit positions and values are the counts of 1s at each position.
statement.notes: Time complexity: O(n), where n is the number of bits in the number. Space complexity: O(n).

functionSignature.python: def solve(self, n: int) -> dict[int, int]:
